tasks.subject: Add pagination (offset) to notification backend API
tasks.description:
1. Add `offset` parameter to InMemoryNotificationRepository.list_for_user()
2. Add `offset` parameter to PostgresNotificationRepository.list_for_user()
3. Add `offset` query parameter to GET /public/notifications route
4. Update frontend API proxy to pass offset
5. Update tests

tasks.subject: Create dedicated /notifications page with tabs, filter, load-more
tasks.description:
Create a full notifications page at frontend/app/notifications/page.tsx with:
1. Tabs: All | Unread
2. Filter dropdown by type (follow, comment_reply, mention)
3. Load more pagination
4. Batch select + mark read
5. Click navigation to resource
6. Polished UI matching the notification bell design language
7. Back button / navigation
